title: Enchantment Glint Normalization
description: Normalizes enchantment glint strength between normal, dyed, and trimmed items.
body:
Have you ever noticed that the enchantment glint effect shines stronger on dyed and trimmed items? This is a longstanding bug first reported in 2019 (https://mojira.dev/MC-166101) that has only gotten worse with the addition of trims and custom compound textures.

This resource pack normalizes the glint amount across normal, dyed, and trimmed items - though compound item models with more than three textures will still be brighter.

It also uses a series of pack overlays to make it so the same pack should work on every major version from 1.17 to 1.21.11.

![comparison of helmets with pack off (top) and on (bottom)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/306d8c737d397d28720d5408640fe6e54da3e9cd.png)
